subScenes.name: 打招呼闲聊
subScenes.description: 朋友间问候并开启社交媒体话题

qaPairs.triggerText: Hey, long time no see! You been posting pics on IG lately?
qaPairs.triggerTextCn: 嘿，好久不见！你最近在Instagram发照片了吗？
qaPairs.scenarioHintCn: 场景提示：用户询问对方在社交媒体上的活动情况

followUps.text: Yeah, I've been posting a lot! You should check out my new travel pics.
followUps.text_cn: 是啊，我发了好多！你去看看我的旅行照吧。

followUps.text: Not really, I'm kinda taking a break.
followUps.text_cn: 没怎么发，我最近想休息一下。

followUps.text: I'm on TikTok now, IG's boring.

qaPairs.usageNote: 用缩写和口语词让对话更自然

subScenes.name: 询问账号
subScenes.description: 主动询问对方社交媒体账号

qaPairs.triggerText: I saw your story on Snapchat—what's your handle?
qaPairs.triggerTextCn: 我刚看到你Snapchat的动态，你的账号是什么？
qaPairs.scenarioHintCn: 适用于询问个人信息或服务信息等场景

followUps.text: I don't really use Snapchat anymore, sorry.
Follow me on Instagram instead—I'm more active there.
followUps.text_cn: 去Instagram关注我吧，我在那儿更活跃。

qaPairs.usageNote: 回答时可推荐其他平台，增加互动

subScenes.name: 讨论功能
subScenes.description: 讨论社交媒体APP的实用功能

qaPairs.triggerText: Do you use Reels? I'm obsessed with the new filters.
qaPairs.triggerTextCn: 你用Reels吗？我超爱那些新滤镜。
qaPairs.scenarioHintCn: 场景提示：用户询问对方是否使用某个功能或产品

followUps.text: Totally! The dancing ones are my fave—so much fun!
followUps.text_cn: 当然！跳舞的那些最棒了，超好玩！

followUps.text: Nah, I find them annoying. I just post static pics.
followUps.text_cn: 不，我觉得烦，我就发静态照片。

followUps.text: I use them for work—great for reaching people.
followUps.text_cn: 我用来工作，能吸引很多人。

qaPairs.usageNote: 表达偏好时用I'm obsessed/annoyed增强语气

qaPairs.triggerText: Why do you use Threads? Isn't it just Twitter 2.0?
qaPairs.scenarioHintCn: 场景提示：用户询问对方是否使用某个功能或产品

followUps.text: It's less toxic, and my friends are all there.
followUps.text_cn: 更少争吵，我朋友都在那儿。

followUps.text: I don't get it—why not just stick with X?
It's good for deep chats, not just memes.
followUps.text_cn: 适合深度聊天，不只是发梗图。

subScenes.name: 确认关注
subScenes.description: 确认对方是否已关注自己

qaPairs.triggerText: Did you follow me on Instagram? I posted that new coffee shop pic.
qaPairs.triggerTextCn: 你关注我Instagram了吗？我发了那家新咖啡馆的照片。
qaPairs.scenarioHintCn: 场景提示：用户发起对话，询问对方是否关注了自己的社交媒体账号

followUps.text: Already followed! Your pics are fire 🔥
Oops, I forgot—gimme a sec, I'll do it now.
followUps.text_cn: 哎呀忘了，等我一下，马上关注。

followUps.text: I don't use IG much, but I saw it on your story.
followUps.text_cn: 我不常玩IG，但看到你动态了。

qaPairs.usageNote: 用gimme/already/fire等词体现非正式语气

subScenes.name: 道别收尾
subScenes.description: 结束对话并约定下次互动

qaPairs.triggerText: Gotta run, but let’s swap handles—text me yours?
qaPairs.triggerTextCn: 我得走了，咱们交换下账号吧？发我你的？
qaPairs.scenarioHintCn: 场景提示：用户提出请求或问题，服务方回应。

followUps.text: Sure! Mine's @chillvibes123—DM me if you wanna collab!
followUps.text_cn: 好啊！我是@chillvibes123，想合作就私我！

followUps.text: Nah, I'm not sharing my account.

qaPairs.usageNote: 用ttyl/dm等网络缩写增强真实感
